stemHtml:
Communications Failure - Flight Procedures: You are on a flight in accordance with IFR in IMC, exactly on the current flight plan route. At 18:36 UTC you receive and acknowledge the following instruction from the radar controller:

"Turn immediately, fly heading 050° until further advised".

At 18:37 UTC you discover a communication failure. Two way radio communication cannot be established again.

options.a: You continue on Heading 050 for 15 minutes.
options.b: You have to return to your current flight plan route.
options.c: You continue on Heading 050 for 30 minutes.
